title: Auto Crystal Switcher
description: After you place obsidian if you have cyrstal in your hotbar it automatically switches to it
body:
# **Auto Crystal Switch**

Auto Crystal Switch is a lightweight PvP utility mod designed for Crystal PvP players who demand maximum speed and precision. When you place obsidian and have an End Crystal in your hotbar, the mod automatically switches to the crystal — allowing you to place it instantly without manual scrolling.

Built for competitive environments, this mod reduces reaction time and improves combo consistency.

## **⚡ How It Works**

Detects when you place Obsidian

Checks if End Crystals are present in your hotbar

Instantly switches to the crystal slot

Ready for immediate crystal placement

No delay. No unnecessary animations. Pure efficiency

## **🔥 Features**

✅ Instant auto-switch on obsidian placement

✅ Only activates if crystal is in hotbar

✅ Smart detection (won’t switch randomly)

✅ Lightweight & optimized for PvP

✅ Compatible with most Fabric PvP clients

✅ No GUI clutter (simple and clean behavior)

## **🎯 Perfect For**

Crystal PvP servers

Anarchy servers

1v1 competitive fights

Fast-paced Netherite PvP

Players who want smoother crystal combos

### 💡 Why Use Auto Crystal Switch?

In Crystal PvP, milliseconds matter. Manually switching slows you down and breaks momentum. This mod ensures your workflow is seamless:

Obsidian → Instant Switch → Place Crystal → Boom.

Cleaner combos. Faster plays. More consistent damage.
